TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: aicu a line mavan a matjaita a tada a apu a tja sipatigami a sipadinghua itua suci katua tingnaw. maqatitjen a sema line a papadjaljun tua sinivecik, sasing, qaqivuan tua zuma. manu izua pupaysuan nua line a pinapungadan a line pay . aicu a line a namasan tjaljamakeljang a apu i dripung, i tayuan, katua i tailend (Thailand). == kasizuanan ==
S.PHON: aiʦu a ɭinə mavan a maʦaita a tada a apu a ʦa sipatigami a sipadiŋhua itua suʦi katua tiŋnaw. maqatiʦən a səma ɭinə a papaɉaʎun tua sinivəʦik, sasiŋ, qaqivuan tua zuma. manu izua pupajsuan nua ɭinə a pinapuŋadan a ɭinə paj . aiʦu a ɭinə a namasan ʦaʎamakəʎaŋ a apu i ɖipuŋ, i tajuan, katua i taiɭənd (thaiɭand). == kasizuanan ==
S.FORM: aicu a line mavan a matjaita a tada a apu a tja sipatigami a sipadinghua itua suci katua tingnaw. maqatitjen a sema line a papadjaljun tua sinivecik, sasing, qaqivuan tua zuma. manu izua pupaysuan nua line a pinapungadan a line pay . aicu a line a namasan tjaljamakeljang a apu i dripung, i tayuan, katua i tailend (Thailand). == kasizuanan ==
S.PHON: aiʦu a ɭinə mavan a maʦaita a tada a apu a ʦa sipatigami a sipadiŋhua itua suʦi katua tiŋnaw. maqatiʦən a səma ɭinə a papaɉaʎun tua sinivəʦik, sasiŋ, qaqivuan tua zuma. manu izua pupajsuan nua ɭinə a pinapuŋadan a ɭinə paj . aiʦu a ɭinə a namasan ʦaʎamakəʎaŋ a apu i ɖipuŋ, i tajuan, katua i taiɭənd (thaiɭand). == kasizuanan ==
